title: helianthemum marifolium var. cavanillesii
intro: Helianthemum marifolium var. cavanillesii, also known as Rockrose, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Cistaceae family. Traditionally, Rockrose has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. Rockrose is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used topically in creams and ointments to aid in skin and wound care.
